description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to master branch for specific file paths and on pull requests to master for the same paths. The workflow also triggers on workflow dispatch. It has three jobs: linux, windows, and tipi-build-linux. The linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a Debian testing container, using a matrix strategy for different compilers, build types, and library compilation. The windows job runs on windows-2022 with a similar matrix strategy but limited to build types and library compilation. The tipi-build-linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a tipi build container, testing project builds and dependency resolution with tipi.
